'''balumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deaddiction|deaddiction]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-l-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deaddiction|deaddiction]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| balumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bælimith|bælimith]] || [[word:bælimij|bælimij]] || [[word:bælimish|bælimish]] || [[word:bælimi|bælimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:balulumuth|balulumuth]] || [[word:balulumuj|balulumuj]] || [[word:balulumush|balulumush]] || [[word:balulumu|balulumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:balumuth|balumuth]] || [[word:balumuj|balumuj]] || [[word:balumush|balumush]] || [[word:balumu|balumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:balufmuth|balufmuth]] || [[word:balufmuj|balufmuj]] || [[word:balufmush|balufmush]] || [[word:balufmuf|balufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:balumuthu|balumuthu]] || [[word:balumuju|balumuju]] || [[word:balumushu|balumushu]] || [[word:balumuku|balumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:balumuth|balumuth]] || [[word:balumuj|balumuj]] || [[word:balumush|balumush]] || [[word:balumu|balumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:balumuthul|balumuthul]] || [[word:balumujul|balumujul]] || [[word:balumushul|balumushul]] || [[word:balumukul|balumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:balumuthuthu|balumuthuthu]] || [[word:balumujuju|balumujuju]] || [[word:balumushushu|balumushushu]] || [[word:balumuku|balumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:balumuthun|balumuthun]] || [[word:balumujun|balumujun]] || [[word:balumushun|balumushun]] || [[word:balumukun|balumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:balumuthuoro|balumuthuoro]] || [[word:balumujuoro|balumujuoro]] || [[word:balumushuoro|balumushuoro]] || [[word:balumukuoro|balumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
